/usr/bin/ar qc libmyproject.a CMakeFiles/opsmp.dir/src/core/opsmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ops_avx2.dir/src/cpu/AVX2/ops_avx2_d64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ops_avx2.dir/src/cpu/AVX2/ops_avx2_f32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ops_avx512.dir/src/cpu/AVX512/ops_avx512_d64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ops_avx512.dir/src/cpu/AVX512/ops_avx512_f32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/core/autograd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/core/ops_dispatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/core/tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/core/data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/core/transforme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/loss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/Relu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/check.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/dropout/dropout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/pooling/pooling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/batchnorm/batchnorm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neuralnet.dir/src/neuralnet/weights/weights_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conv.dir/src/neuralnet/conv/conv.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmyproject.a
